extras.content: For the less fortunate, house rules may restrict the freedom to invite friends to visit. 译文:对那些不太幸运的人来说，房东制定的规则限制你邀请朋友来访的自由。

entries.mnemonic: 由 set back(使退步)构成的名词

senses.example: The team suffered a major setback when their best player was injured.
senses.example_zh: 最优秀的队员受了伤，使得这支队伍的实力大打折扣。

senses.example: The government has imposed limitation on imports.
senses.example_zh: 政府已经对进口加以了限制。

senses.example: He is a brilliant professor but has his limitations as an administrator.
senses.example_zh: 他是一位出色的教授，但作为管理者他有不足之处。

entries.mnemonic: con(共同)+fine(边界)→共同的边界→界限

senses.def_en: to keep sb. or sth. within the limits of a particular activity or subject
senses.example: Please confine your remarks to the subject under discussion.
senses.example_zh: 请将你的发言限制于我们所讨论的主题上。

senses.example: You should be confined to the house if you haven't finished the homework!
Many places are worth visiting within the confines of China.
senses.example_zh: 中国境内有很多地方值得游览。

senses.def_en: to limit or control the size, amount, or range of sth.; to limit sb.'s actions or movements
senses.example: Speed is restricted to 30 mph in towns. // Having small children tends to restrict your freedom.
senses.example_zh: 市内车速每小时不得超过30英里。// 有了小孩往往会限制你的自由。

derivatives: restrictive a. 限制的;(语法)限定性的

senses.def_en: to become larger in size, number, or amount
senses.example: The Nokia company wants to expand its market in Asia.
senses.example_zh: 诺基亚公司想扩大其在亚洲的市场。

senses.example: We had made huge profits due to the expansion of business.
senses.example_zh: 由于业务扩展，我们获得了巨额利润。

senses.example: Heat causes the expansion of gases.
I stretched to relax after working a full day. // The desert stretches for hundreds of miles.
senses.example_zh: 工作了一整天，我伸了个懒腰放松一下。// 沙漠绵延数百英里。

senses.example: She stretched herself to provide for the family.
a stretch of time // a beautiful stretch of countryside
senses.example_zh: 一段时间 // 一片乡村美景

senses.example: Finances can consist of a combination of stocks, bonds, and properties.
senses.example_zh: 资金可以是股票、债券和财产的结合。

senses.def_en: to provide money, especially a lot, to pay for sth.
senses.example: These concerts are financed by the Arts Council.
senses.example_zh: 这些音乐会是由艺术委员会资助的。

senses.example: To some degree bonus is an effective way to motivate the workers.
